summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of AutoFlip Intelligence car dealer monitoring app. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working excellently including new features: navigation tabs, About page, Settings page with scan interval controls, live scanning indicator with countdown, and scan history.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
All 95 listings loading from 3 sources (Cathcart Rebuilders: 51, Cathcart Used: 12, Pic N Save: 32)
GET /api/listings returns all active scraped listings with profit data
GET /api/listings with all filters working: source, search, min_profit, max_price, min_score, sort_by
GET /api/stats returns correct stats (13 BUY, 15 WATCH, 39 SKIP deals, $15,462 top profit)
GET /api/scrape-status returns status with scan_interval and is_scanning flag
GET /api/scan-history returns list of past scan entries
GET /api/settings returns current settings with scan_interval
PUT /api/settings successfully updates scan_interval (tested 900s then reset to 600s)
POST /api/scrape triggers new scan successfully
Dashboard page loads with listings in table view sorted by deal score
Navigation tabs work perfectly: Dashboard, About, Settings
About page renders with hero section, feature cards, websites monitored, profit calculation explanation, repair cost table, deal scoring
Settings page shows scan frequency options (5/10/15/30 min) with selection working
Settings page shows scan history list with timestamps
Settings page Save Settings button updates the interval correctly
Live scanning indicator shows in navbar with pulsing dot, 'Live' status, countdown timer, and interval
Search filter filters listings by make/model (tested Toyota, Honda)
Source dropdown filters by source (tested Cathcart Rebuilders)
Clicking listing row opens detail dialog with full profit breakdown
Detail dialog shows all required fields: photos, price, mileage, damage, brand, market value, repair costs, profit range, ROI, deal score
Mobile responsiveness working with card view layout
All filtering parameters working correctly in backend API
Deal score algorithm working with BUY/WATCH/SKIP labels
Market value estimation formula working (MOCKED as expected)
Ontario fees calculation working (HST + OMVIC + MTO + Safety)
Auto-refresh functionality working (observed countdown timer updating)
Desktop and mobile UI both working perfectly

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI functionality working including new features)
